title: Shri Mahagauri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Mahagauri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Mahagauri.
description:
Jai Mahagauri jagat ki maya,
Jai Uma Bhavani jai Mahamaya॥
Haridwar Kankhal ke pasa,
Mahagauri tera vaha niwas॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Chanderkali aur Mamata Ambe,
Jai Shakti jai jai Maa Jagdambe॥
Bhima Devi Vimala Mata,
Koshki Devi jag vikhyata॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Himachal ke ghar Gori roop tera,
Mahakali Durga hai swaroop tera॥
Sati ‘Sat’ havan kund mein tha jalaya,
Usi dhuein ne roop Kali banaya॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Bana dharm Singh jo sawari mein aaya,
To Shankar ne trishul apna dikhaya॥
Tabhi Maa ne Mahagauri naam paya,
Sharan aane wale ka sankat mitaya॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

Shanivar ko teri puja jo karta,
Maa bigada hua kaam uska sudharta॥
‘Chaman’ bolo to soch tum kya rahe ho,
Mahagauri Maa teri hardam hi jai ho॥
॥ Jai Mahagauri Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Mahagauri's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Mahagauri is the symbol of purity, peace, and serenity. Her Aarti washes away past sins, brings peace and prosperity to life, and helps make even the impossible tasks possible.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The eighth day of Navratri (Ashtami) is dedicated to Maa Mahagauri and is considered the most auspicious for her worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Mahagauri during Aarti?
faq.a3: Offering coconut is considered the most dear and auspicious for Maa Mahagauri.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and a sattvic (pure) mindset in the home temple on the eighth day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Mahagauryai Namah' after the Aarti is highly beneficial for mental peace and purity.
